testcase.name: test_fetch_gists

failure.message:
assert b'from typing import List

testcase.failure:
mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4430991056'>
@patch("requests.get") def test_fetch_gist_content(mock_get): mock_response = MagicMock() mock_response.text = "print('Hello, world!')" mock_get.return_value = mock_response content = fetch_gist_content( "https://gist.githubusercontent.com/rjvitorino/dfef5433066c061954d29d1b15202290/raw/54a0207aaf64e70e57a2063795b0a1c88a6b046c/file1.py" ) > assert content == "print('Hello, world!')"
